overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a neon-lit night market. The player approaches an NPC vendor at a food stall, observes her drinking from a bottle, then continues past the counter to explore the cluttered back area with industrial equipment and washing machines. The scene features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with red paper lanterns and cyan neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor leading to covered market

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open covered market area with hanging red lanterns
slows down while approaching the market counter and NPC vendor

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage and emerging into a cyberpunk market, approaching a vendor stall

notable_agents.action: standing behind the market counter, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement billboard with text 'Worry-free Coming in 2080'
long white counter with blue hose reel and various equipment on top
multiple red Japanese-style paper lanterns hanging in a row from the ceiling
large dark metal support pillar with pipes running vertically
coiled blue hose on a white reel sitting on the counter

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow corridor with a prominent billboard, then transitions into a covered cyberpunk market. The camera approaches a market counter where an NPC vendor stands, with red paper lanterns hanging overhead and industrial pillars visible. The environment features concrete flooring and artificial neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall counter with industrial equipment

events.description: NPC vendor picks up a bottle from the counter and begins drinking
NPC finishes drinking and begins to turn away from the counter

agents.ego_description: circling around the counter area observing the NPC vendor's actions and the surrounding market details

notable_agents.action: interacting with a bottle, drinking from it, then adjusting her hair and moving away

entered.detail: row of industrial washing machines with circular doors against the left wall
stacked cardboard boxes on the floor near the washing machines

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on an NPC vendor at a market stall who picks up a bottle and drinks from it. The environment reveals industrial elements including washing machines and cardboard boxes in the background. Red paper lanterns hang overhead providing ambient red lighting mixed with cyan neon. The NPC interacts with objects on the counter before beginning to move away.

scene_state.functional_zone: back area of market with laundry equipment

events.description: moves past the market counter and continues deeper into the back area
passes close to industrial pillar temporarily obscuring view of the back wall

agents.ego_description: moving past the counter and exploring the back area of the market, examining the washing machines and storage boxes

entered.detail: illuminated green and red neon signs visible in the background through the market

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the market counter into the back area, revealing industrial washing machines and stacked cardboard boxes. The NPC vendor has exited the frame. The environment shows more of the market's cluttered interior with neon signs visible in the distant background. The camera continues to explore the space, passing close to a large industrial support pillar.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow urban corridor into the cluttered, neon-lit depths of a cyberpunk market. It begins by passing a prominent billboard and entering a covered marketplace, where the camera approaches a vendor standing beneath hanging red paper lanterns and industrial pillars. As the camera lingers at the counter, the vendor picks up a bottle to drink, revealing a backdrop of washing machines and cardboard boxes bathed in a mix of red and cyan neon light. The scene then shifts as the camera moves past the vendor and the counter, pushing further into the industrial back area. Finally, the view expands to explore the cluttered interior, passing a large support pillar while distant neon signs flicker in the background.
